title: TreeChopMod
description: Chop entire trees by breaking one log - fully configurable with auto replant and tool safety.
body:
# 🪓 TreeChopMod

[![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-26.2-2d9e2d)](https://minecraft.net)
[![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Fabric-0.19.3+-d7b342)](https://fabricmc.net)

Chop entire trees by breaking one log.

## Features

- **One-Click Tree Chopping** - Break one log, watch the whole tree fall.
- **Fully Configurable** - Tweak every aspect to fit your playstyle.
- **Tool Friendly** - Supports durability, axe requirements, and tool protection.
- **Auto Replant** - Automatically replants a sapling after a tree is chopped.
- **Leaf Decay Integration** - Chopped trees decay naturally, no leaf cleanup needed.
- **Performance Optimized** - Breaks blocks in small chunks to maintain performance.

## Controls

- `K` - Open settings menu (rebindable in Options -> Controls -> Keybinds -> Miscellaneous)

## Screenshots

![Chopping Demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WYceNBJS/images/f0161c25311cd668a1fc46f6582722592f215819.gif)

![Config Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WYceNBJS/images/c89a36681a5e062f5349781c514fb3f7fe2d173e.png)

## Settings

| Setting | Default | Description |
|---------|---------|-------------|
| **Mod Enabled** | ON | Enable/disable the mod |
| **Require Axe** | ON | Must be holding an axe |
| **Tool Safety** | ON | Stop before tool breaks |
| **Require Sneak** | OFF | Only chop when sneaking |
| **Base Break Only** | ON | Must break the bottom log |
| **Max Radius** | 48 | Max search distance (0-128 blocks) |
| **Max Logs** | 256 | Max logs to chop (1-512) |
| **Speed** | 15 | Blocks broken per tick (1-20) |
| **Auto Replant** | ON | Auto-plant a sapling after chopping |

## Requirements

- **Minecraft:** 26.2
- **Java:** 25+
- **Fabric Loader:** 0.19.3+
- **Fabric API:** Required

## Support

- Favorite on Modrinth
- Star on Gitea

## License

MIT
